logging-spring-tests/src/main/java/com/g.general_idea: Explicitly specify the parameter name in @RequestParam to ensure correct binding.
Explicitly declare the consumed media type for the POST endpoint to handle form data.
Add a new endpoint to handle multipart file uploads.

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Introduce a BeforeEach setup to configure a MemoryAppender for capturing log output from the SpringLoggingFilter.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: @BeforeEach void setup() { Logger logger = (Logger) LoggerFactory.getLogger(SpringLoggingFilter.class); memoryAppender = new MemoryAppender(); ... }

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Add assertions to existing tests to verify that the logging filter correctly captures request/response details.
Refactor postByIdReqParam test to use HttpEntity with form-encoded data instead of passing null body, ensuring correct request structure.
Add a new test case to verify multipart file upload functionality and its logging behavior.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: @Test public void postMultipart() throws IOException { ... body.add("file", getTestFile()); ... }

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Add a helper method to create a temporary file resource for use in multipart upload tests.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: public Resource getTestFile() throws IOException { Path testFile = Files.createTempFile(...); return new FileSystemResource(testFile.toFile()); }

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Introduce a new configuration property to allow ignoring request/response payloads in the logging filter.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Added 'private boolean ignorePayload = false;' field and corresponding getter/setter methods.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Wire the new ignorePayload configuration into the SpringLoggingFilter bean instantiation.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Updated loggingFilter() bean definition to pass 'ignorePayload' as the fourth argument to the constructor.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Extract request and response logging logic into a dedicated LoggingPrinter class to reduce boilerplate and improve maintainability.
Remove the import for org.apache.commons.io.IOUtils as it is no longer used directly in this class after refactoring.
Remove the unused import for java.util.Map.
Remove the unused static import for net.logstash.logback.argument.StructuredArguments.value.
Add a new boolean parameter 'ignorePayload' to the constructor to allow controlling payload logging behavior.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: public SpringLoggingFilter(..., boolean logHeaders, boolean ignorePayload)

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Remove the 'logHeaders' field as its state is now managed within the LoggingPrinter instance.
Remove the unused variable 'handlerMethods' in getHandlerMethod which was assigned but never used.
Cache the request parameter map in the constructor to ensure it remains accessible after the input stream is consumed.
Use the query string as the body content for GET requests to preserve request data when the input stream is empty.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: String query = request.getQueryString(); if (query != null) { body = query.getBytes(); }

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Override getParameterMap to return the cached map, preventing errors when parameters are accessed after the stream is read.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: @Override public Map<String, String[]> getParameterMap() { return parameterMap; }

reactive-logging-spring-tests/src/main/j.general_idea: Add a new GET endpoint to handle request parameters for testing purposes.
Add a new POST endpoint consuming form-urlencoded data to handle request parameters for testing purposes.
reactive-logging-spring-tests/src/main/j.human_impl: @PostMapping(value = "/req-param", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED_VALUE) public Mono<String> postWithIdRequest(@RequestParam("id") Integer id)

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Enhance request logging to include query parameters in the audit trail for better traceability.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Added `exchange.getRequest().getQueryParams().toSingleValueMap()` to the LOGGER.info calls for requests.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Standardize code indentation from tabs to spaces to comply with project style guidelines.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Replaced tab characters with 4-space indentation throughout the file.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Add missing spaces around operators and after commas for improved code readability.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Added spaces around `==`, `||`, and after commas in method arguments and conditions.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Remove explicit MDC clearing to prevent side effects on concurrent requests or parent context leakage.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Removed `MDC.clear();` call at the start of `generateAndSetMDC`.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Fix logic error where correlation ID was incorrectly read from and stored under the request ID header name.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Changed `request.getHeaders().get(requestIdHeaderName)` to `get(correlationIdHeaderName)` and updated `MDC.put` keys to use `correlationIdHeaderName`.
